title: Historical Access And Runtime Revalidation
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 access-and-runtime revalidation slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-001` access-and-runtime revalidation slice
objective: Run a narrow read-only revalidation of workstation-to-Olares access and current host runtime evidence so the Olares Phase 5 expansion lane can determine whether the present workstation, services, staging, and private-lane surfaces are actually live and inspectable before any migration, AI-toolchain expansion, or hosting decision is considered.
dependency_note: The 2026-05-03 Phase 5 Step 1 assessment concluded that the current workstation evidence does not support Olares-first daily development and recommended a narrow access and runtime revalidation packet only. This packet exists to refresh live evidence without reopening generic Olares implementation or widening scope into migration, AI services, or canonical hosting decisions.
required_inputs: The Step 1 assessment verdict and gaps recorded in ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-03-olares-phase-5-step-1-dev-workspace-state-and-access-assessment-handoff.md

The current post-closure authority and evidence floor from ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-01-olares-runtime-surface-restoration-handoff.md and ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-01-olares-private-stack-browser-terminal-bring-up-handoff.md
Current workstation network evidence for LarePass or TermiPass routing, mesh IP presence, and SSH reachability to 100.64.0.1
Read-only host runtime evidence for Docker, K3s or Helm, installed apps, ports, volumes, networks, and route health if workstation-to-host access can be re-established
Current browser-terminal availability through the authenticated Olares UI if private-mesh SSH remains unavailable
constrained_outputs: A dated handoff recording whether workstation-to-host private-mesh access is restored, still blocked, or replaced by a browser-terminal-only fallback
A read-only host runtime inventory classified into dev, services, staging, and private-lane buckets
A revalidated statement about whether VS Code Remote-SSH is currently viable for daily editing
A revalidated statement about whether the installed forms-engine and p6-ingest surfaces plus private-lane backup timers remain live and inspectable
A recommendation that either keeps Olares-first migration closed, or narrows the next approved packet based on refreshed evidence
No installs, no promotions, no ingress changes, no auth changes, no canonical-hosting changes
validation_steps: Revalidate the LarePass or TermiPass private-mesh route from the current workstation to 100.64.0.1 without changing public-host trust or auth posture.
If private-mesh SSH succeeds, capture read-only host runtime inventory for Docker, K3s or Helm, installed routes, ports, volumes, and networks.
If private-mesh SSH still fails, revalidate whether authenticated browser-terminal fallback remains available and sufficient to capture bounded host runtime evidence.
Revalidate whether VS Code Remote-SSH is currently viable once the controlling trusted path is restored.
Classify observed runtime truth into dev, services, staging, and private-lane buckets rather than treating all host evidence as one blended Olares state.
Do not install or modify services, do not restart runtime surfaces, and do not change ingress, auth, or canonical-hosting posture while executing this packet.
Record all results in a dated handoff even if the final disposition remains blocked or only partially revalidated.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes read-only revalidation and evidence capture only. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, new Olares installs, AI-toolchain rollout, ingress changes, or canonical-hosting changes.
closure_note: Executed on 2026-05-03 with a partial result. Workstation-side access revalidation confirmed that `LarePassService` was running but `TermiPass` remained on link-local address `169.254.149.107`, no usable `100.64.*` route was present, and `100.64.0.1:22` timed out. Host runtime was not directly inspected because SSH to the Olares host failed, so Docker, K3s or Helm, installed-app, and private-lane runtime truth remain unknown from this pass. The result confirms the existing Step 1 boundary rather than materially changing it.
next_action: Proceed to the Step 3 decision-surface synthesis in Claude Code with Packet 001 recorded as partial and with host runtime evidence still blocked; do not open Olares-first migration, AI services-zone expansion, or hosting-transition work from this evidence.
